body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #359

### To Do
- [x] update BulkAlbedoStatic, BulkAlbedoTemporal, PrescribedDataStatic, PrescribedDataTemporal
- [x] update function calls
- [x] add iamroot checks
- [x] test from coupler (see https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-ci/builds/2144)

Note: we may want to keep the filepath argument as String type, in case we want to use a file that's already downloaded. We should figure out a different solution for this

<!---

I have:

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: albedo artifacts race condition fix
